message:
fix(test): Clippy cleanups — map_or, or-patterns, uninlined format args

lib.rs: rewrite .find().map().unwrap_or("") chains as .find().map_or("", ...)
in 4 test helpers (Clippy option_map_unwrap_or).

tui_theme.rs: inline format args in 3 assert messages using {theme_id:?}
syntax (Clippy uninlined_format_args).
